SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class WaitlistEntryDTO

java.lang.Object
common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class WaitlistEntryDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable data transfer object representing a single waiting-list entry — a visitor's queue position for a park/date that was full when they booked.

An entry is always paired with a ReservationDTO in ReservationStatus.WAITING; the waiting_list_entry row carries only the queueing/offer timestamps, while the booking details (which park, which date, party size, owning visitor) live on the reservation. The four convenience fields getParkId(), getVisitDate(), getPartySize() and getVisitorId() are JOIN-ed in from that reservation by WaitlistDAO so a single round-trip gives a caller everything it needs to act on the entry (offer a grab, notify the visitor) without re-fetching the reservation.

As elsewhere, the DATETIME columns are carried as strings (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss) to keep java.sql types off the wire. The two offer timestamps are null until the entry is offered a freed slot: getGrabOfferedAt()/getGrabExpiresAt() are both set together by WaitlistDAO.markOffered(int, java.lang.String), and a non-null pair with an expiry still in the future marks an active grab offer.

See Also:

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private String
    grabExpiresAt
    When the active grab offer lapses, or null if none is active.
    private String
    grabOfferedAt
    When a freed slot was offered to this entry, or null if none is active.
    private int
    id
    Unique waiting-list entry identifier (primary key).
    private int
    parkId
    Park the queued reservation is for (joined from the reservation).
    private int
    partySize
    Party size of the queued reservation (joined).
    private String
    queuedAt
    When the visitor joined the queue (DB DATETIME as string).
    private int
    reservationId
    Identifier of the WAITING reservation this entry queues.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization identifier for this class.
    private String
    visitDate
    Visit date the queued reservation is for, ISO yyyy-MM-dd (joined).
    private long
    visitorId
    National-ID-style identifier of the owning visitor (joined).

  • Constructor Details

    • WaitlistEntryDTO

      public WaitlistEntryDTO(int id, int reservationId, String queuedAt, String grabOfferedAt, String grabExpiresAt, int parkId, String visitDate, int partySize, long visitorId)
      Creates a fully populated waiting-list entry.
      Parameters:
      id - unique waiting-list entry identifier
      reservationId - identifier of the queued WAITING reservation
      queuedAt - when the visitor joined the queue (string DATETIME)
      grabOfferedAt - when a freed slot was offered, or null
      grabExpiresAt - when the active offer lapses, or null
      parkId - park the reservation is for (joined)
      visitDate - visit date the reservation is for, ISO yyyy-MM-dd (joined)
      partySize - party size of the reservation (joined)
      visitorId - identifier of the owning visitor (joined)
